hero.label: Contact Us
hero.title: Let's Start a Conversation
hero.description: Whether you need a quote on recycled fibers, want to schedule waste collection, or just have questions — we're here to help.

sidebar.title: Get in Touch
sidebar.description: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out by phone, email, or use the form and we'll get back to you promptly.
sidebar.tip1Description: Call us directly or use the form to describe your waste stream and we'll provide a pickup quote.
sidebar.tip2Description: Tell us about your application and we'll send you samples of our available fiber grades.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll respond within one business day.

mapSection.label: Find Us
mapSection.title: Visit Our Facility
mapSection.description: We're located in Broadalbin, New York — in the heart of the Adirondack foothills. Stop by during business hours or schedule a visit.

faqHeader.label: Common Questions
faqHeader.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqHeader.description: Quick answers to the questions we hear most often.
